body:
### Problem

Hi,

OpenBSD packager here.

For the last few releases, the tar tests have been failing on OpenBSD:
```
        From test_plugin_tar.vim:                                                                                                                                │ePresets.json cmake
        Found errors in Test_tar_basic():                                                                                                                        │          deps.txt
        command line..script /usr/local/pobj/neovim-0.12.2/neovim-0.12.2/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_basic line 1       │arrakis:cmake.deps> rg
1: Pattern 'testtar/' does not match 'testtar'                                                                                                                   │ 1.52.1-0
        Found errors in Test_tar_evil():                                                                                                                         │
        command line..script /usr/local/pobj/neovim-0.12.2/neovim-0.12.2/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_evil line 15       │
: Pattern '/etc/ax-pwn' does not match 'etc/ax-pwn'                                                                                                              │arrakis:cmake.deps> rg
        Caught exception in Test_tar_evil(): Vim(read):E484: Can't open file etc/ax-pwn @ command line..script /usr/local/pobj/neovim-0.12.2/neovim-0.12.2       │ fbb36bb6bfa88716a47c5
/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_evil[25]..<SNR>10_TarBrowseSelect[27]..tar#Read, line 114                                  │8bcf9ce9f2ef752abac
        Found errors in Test_tar_path_traversal_with_nowrapscan():                                                                                               │arrakis:cmake.deps> rg
        command line..script /usr/local/pobj/neovim-0.12.2/neovim-0.12.2/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_path_travers       │ fbb36bb6bfa88716a47c5
al_with_nowrapscan[2]..<SNR>8_CopyFile line 2: Can't copy samples/evil.tar                                                                                       │8bcf9ce9f2ef752abac
        command line..script /usr/local/pobj/neovim-0.12.2/neovim-0.12.2/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_path_travers       │arrakis:cmake.deps> ls
al_with_nowrapscan line 15: Pattern '/etc/ax-pwn' does not match 'etc/ax-pwn'
```

^ This was with neovim-0.12.2 release.

Sorry, I haven't had time to investigate further.

### Steps to reproduce

run the old test suite.

### Expected behavior

tests pass

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

neovim-0.12.2 release

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

n/a

### Operating system/version

OpenBSD-current/amd64

### Terminal name/version

n/a

### $TERM environment variable

n/a

### Installation

OpenBSD package

comment_data.body:
Can confirm an issue on master (a0637e0c4e7401f9be86dd152405724ba5016a90). Some other failures I've not seen before here too:

```
Failures:
	From test_plugin_tar.vim:
	Found errors in Test_extraction():
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_extraction[42]..<SNR>8_CreateTxz line 6: Expected 0 but got 1
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_extraction line 46: line 5 wrong in archive: Xarchive.txz: Expected 'X.txt' but got ''
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_extraction line 49: vshell error not 0: Expected 0 but got 1
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_extraction line 50: X.txt not readable for archive: Xarchive.txz: Expected True but got 0
	Caught exception in Test_extraction(): Vim(call):E484: Can't open file X.txt @ command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_extraction, line 51
	Found errors in Test_tar_basic():
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_basic line 11: Expected 'testtar/' but got 'testtar'
	Found errors in Test_tar_evil():
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_evil line 15: Expected '/etc/ax-pwn' but got 'etc/ax-pwn'
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_evil line 26: Pattern '(tar#Extract) Path Traversal Attack detected, not extracting!' does not match '\n***error*** (tar#Extract) tar -pxf X.tar etc/ax-pwn: failed!'
	Caught exception in Test_tar_evil(): Vim(read):E484: Can't open file etc/ax-pwn @ command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_evil[30]..<SNR>10_TarBrowseSelect[27]..tar#Read, line 114
	Found errors in Test_tar_path_traversal_with_nowrapscan():
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_path_traversal_with_nowrapscan[2]..<SNR>8_CopyFile line 2: Can't copy samples/evil.tar
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_tar_path_traversal_with_nowrapscan line 15: Expected '/etc/ax-pwn' but got 'etc/ax-pwn'
	From test_shell.vim:
	Found errors in Test_shell_options():
	Caught exception in Test_shell_options(): Vim(read):E485: Can't read file /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/X-test-tmpdir/nvim.edd/3vZY4d/4 @ command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_shell_options, line 62
	From test_sort.vim:
	Found errors in Test_sort_cmd():
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_sort_cmd line 1289: sort with locale en_US.UTF-8: Expected ['a', 'A', 'à', 'À', 'e', 'E', 'é', 'É', 'è', 'È', 'o', 'O', 'ô', 'Ô', 'œ', 'Œ', 'z', 'Z'] but got ['A', 'E', 'O', 'Z', 'a', 'e', 'o', 'z', 'À', 'È', 'É', 'Ô', 'à', 'è', 'é', 'ô', 'Œ', 'œ']
	Found errors in Test_sort_strings():
	command line..script /home/edd/source/neovim/test/old/testdir/runtest.vim[659]..function RunTheTest[61]..Test_sort_strings line 21: Expected ['a', 'A', 'ä', 'Ä', 'o', 'O', 'ô', 'Ô', 'œ', 'Œ', 'p', 'P'] but got ['A', 'O', 'P', 'a', 'o', 'p', 'Ä', 'Ô', 'ä', 'ô', 'Œ', 'œ']
```

labels.description: BSD descendant (specify in the issue description)
labels.name: platform:bsd

labels.description: Upstream issue that must be fixed in Vim first.
labels.name: needs:vim-patch

milestone.description: Low priority items. We plan to work on this but don't have a target date.
milestone.title: backlog

title: tar tests fail on OpenBSD
